title: Beef and Floral Noodle Soup (Chinese-Inspired)
description: A hearty and flavorful soup infused with floral notes, inspired by Chinese cuisine. This comforting dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Bring the beef broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the floral mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in soy sauce and sugar (if using).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional floral notes if desired.
